Delhi Ranji Trophy Crisis: Selector Leaves Mid-Season

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Delhi Ranji Trophy Crisis: Selector Leaves Mid-Season

Delhi cricket has hit another crisis after a team selector walked out mid-season, raising concerns over management issues and selection disagreements during the Ranji Trophy campaign.
